channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18440] Multiple SEL OVS32 tags timed out during 48 hours automated FOFB run
item.description:
Multiple SEL OVS 32 tags were timed out during 48 hours lustre FOFB run.

 echo 'TagProlog' ; echo `pwd` ; echo 'lfs getdirstripe -r .' ; lfs getdirstripe -r . ; echo 'lfs getstripe -r .' ; lfs getstripe -r .
 TagProlog
 /lus/kjcf05/flash/ostest.vers/alsorun.20241024070601.93268.jupiter-p1/CL_IOR_sel_32ovs_all_SF_wr_10iter_834K_rand.1.cR2Hxu.1729904147
 lfs getdirstripe -r .
 .
 lmv_stripe_count: 0 lmv_stripe_offset: 0 lmv_hash_type: none
 mdtidx		 FID[seq:oid:ver]
 lfs getstripe -r .
 .
 stripe_count:  1 stripe_size:   4194304 pattern:       raid0 stripe_offset: -1 pool:          flash
 
 set +v
 ubrun: Env OSTEST_CL=/hpcdc/project/craytest/ostest/binaries/xt/rel.70up03.aries.cray-sp2/xtcnl/ostest/ROOT.latest
 ubrun: Binary Info: -rwxr-xr-x 1 vers tsttool 13207864 May  9  2023 /hpcdc/project/craytest/ostest/binaries/xt/rel.70up03.aries.cray-sp2/xtcnl/ostest/ROOT.latest/tests/gold/ioperf/IOR/IOR
 ubrun: Execute Cmd: '  aptrun -n 24 -N 4 /hpcdc/project/craytest/ostest/binaries/xt/rel.70up03.aries.cray-sp2/xtcnl/ostest/ROOT.latest/tests/gold/ioperf/IOR/IOR -o /lus/kjcf05/flash/ostest.vers/alsorun.20241024070601.93268.jupiter-p1/CL_IOR_sel_32ovs_all_SF_wr_10iter_834K_rand.1.cR2Hxu.1729904147/CL_IOR_sel_32ovs_all_SF_wr_10iter_834K_rand/IORfile -a POSIX -i 10 -w -r -W -t 834K -b 14178K -e -k -vv -E -q -s 33 -x -z'
 bash: line 71:  4406 Killed                  timeout -s TERM -k 120 7200 ubrun -x -s "Perf_" -T CL_IOR_sel_32ovs_all_SF_wr_10iter_834K_rand -B 'export dirname=$TMPDIR/CL_IOR_sel_32ovs_all_SF_wr_10iter_834K_rand ; mkdir -p $dirname ; lfs setstripe --stripe-size 4M --stripe-count 1 --component-end 256M --extension-size 128M --component-end -1 --overstripe-count 32 --extension-size 512M $dirname || exit 1;' -t -D -o -e OSTEST_CL aptrun -n 24 -N 4 OSTEST_CL=tests/gold/ioperf/IOR/IOR -o $TMPDIR/CL_IOR_sel_32ovs_all_SF_wr_10iter_834K_rand/IORfile -a POSIX -i 10 -w -r -W -t 834K -b 14178K -e -k -vv -E -q -s 33 -x -z < /dev/null
 TagEpilog
 /lus/kjcf05/flash/ostest.vers/alsorun.20241024070601.93268.jupiter-p1/CL_IOR_sel_32ovs_all_SF_wr_10iter_834K_rand.1.cR2Hxu.1729904147
 lfs getdirstripe -r .
 .
 lmv_stripe_count: 0 lmv_stripe_offset: 0 lmv_hash_type: none
 mdtidx		 FID[seq:oid:ver]
 ./CL_IOR_sel_32ovs_all_SF_wr_10iter_834K_rand.4410
 lmv_stripe_count: 0 lmv_stripe_offset: 0 lmv_hash_type: none
 mdtidx		 FID[seq:oid:ver]
 ./CL_IOR_sel_32ovs_all_SF_wr_10iter_834K_rand
 lmv_stripe_count: 2 lmv_stripe_offset: 0 lmv_hash_type: fnv_1a_64
 mdtidx		 FID[seq:oid:ver]
      0		 [0x200353d98:0x29d:0x0]		
      1		 [0x24033bd34:0x29d:0x0]
item.environment:
Client cluster: Jupiter-p1

79 x Lustre 2.16 clients
12 X lnet routers
 
Lustre client:
2.16.0_RC4_3_g90745d1
 
storage cluster: kjcf05
NEO build: 6.6-020.112
 
Lustre server:
2.16.0_RC4_3_g90745d1
 
Model SSUs:
E1000
4 x OSS nodes
item.summary: Multiple SEL OVS32 tags timed out during 48 hours automated FOFB run

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
